title: [NO NEW TESTS NEEDED] Fix destination branch for v3.4.2-rhel
body:
Necessary to make Cirrus happy.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *mheon* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/v3.4.2-rhel/OWNERS)~~ [mheon] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@edsantiago Where is the [NO NEW TESTS NEEDED] tag recognized, again? Commit title, PR title, commit description...?
Magic string not needed for `/cirrus.yml` - only changes. But the preferred place is git commit message.
Uh-oh. The static build task is pulling an image from docker.io, and I think it might be rate-limiting us now.

LGTM
all happy green tests.  @mheon, is this gtg?
